summary: Recent updates to Firefox have focused on enhancing its media handling capabilities and simplifying the code behind it. A key addition is the implementation of the **Picture In Picture API**, which allows users to watch videos in a small window that stays on top of other applications, making multitasking easier. Additionally, internal improvements to how the browser manages audio streams and strengthens references ensure better performance and reliability when decoding media. These changes not only streamline the browser's architecture but also contribute to a more robust user experience for consuming various media formats.
